title: Raw Umami Crunch
description: A light Croatian dish featuring raw peanuts and fermented elements for a crunchy, umami-rich snack.
instructions: Soak peanuts in water for at least 6 hours or overnight.
Drain and rinse the soaked peanuts. Add them to a food processor along with fermented vegetables, fresh herbs, raw honey, flax seeds, and sea salt.
Blend until smooth and creamy, adding more liquid if needed to reach your desired consistency.
Transfer the mixture into an ice cube tray or small molds for freezing.
Freeze for about 30 minutes. Break them apart when frozen solid.
